TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-pear4_tosi_ masin
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: totataa' ila o.
S.PHON: totataaʔ ila o.
S.FORM: totataa' ila o.
S.PHON: totataaʔ ila o.
S.TRANSL: 公雞啼了.
A rooster crowed.

S.FORM: baki' e 'aehae' rima' rokrok ka boway rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: βakiʔ ə ʔæhæʔ rimaʔ rokrok ka βowaj rokrok ka βowaj.
S.FORM: baki' e 'aehae' rima' rokrok ka boway rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: βakiʔ ə ʔæhæʔ rimaʔ rokrok ka βowaj rokrok ka βowaj.
S.TRANSL: 一個老人去摘水果.
An old man went to pick fruits.

S.FORM: too' kala' ray isaza.
S.PHON: tooʔ kalaʔ raj is~θaz~ða.
S.FORM: too' kala' ray isaza.
S.PHON: tooʔ kalaʔ raj is~θaz~ða.
S.TRANSL: 有三籃在那裡.
Three baskets were there.

S.FORM: iya rokrokon rokrokon.
S.PHON: ija rokrokon rokrokon.
S.FORM: iya rokrokon rokrokon.
S.PHON: ija rokrokon rokrokon.

TRANSL.notes: (他)繼續摘水果.

S.TRANSL: 繼續摘水果.

TRANSL.notes: (He) kept on picking fruits.

S.TRANSL: kept on picking fruits.

S.FORM: ray obos 'aehae' mayhae'hae' ila.
S.PHON: raj oβos~θ ʔæhæʔ majhæʔhæʔ ila.
S.FORM: ray obos 'aehae' mayhae'hae' ila.
S.PHON: raj oβos~θ ʔæhæʔ majhæʔhæʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 有一個袋子裝滿了.

TRANSL.notes: There was one bag which was full (of fruits).

S.TRANSL: There was one bag which was full .

S.FORM: eh rokrok naehaen.
S.PHON: əh rokrok næhæn.
S.FORM: eh rokrok naehaen.
S.PHON: əh rokrok næhæn.

TRANSL.notes: (他)還在繼續摘.

S.TRANSL: 還在繼續摘.

TRANSL.notes: (He) kept on picking (fruits).

S.TRANSL: kept on picking .

S.FORM: sahae' ila mayhae'hae' ila ray 'obos o sahae' 'aehae'.
S.PHON: s~θahæʔ ila majhæʔhæʔ ila raj ʔoβos~θ o s~θahæʔ ʔæhæʔ.
S.FORM: sahae' ila mayhae'hae' ila ray 'obos o sahae' 'aehae'.
S.PHON: s~θahæʔ ila majhæʔhæʔ ila raj ʔoβos~θ o s~θahæʔ ʔæhæʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (袋子)滿了有一顆水果掉下來.

S.TRANSL: 滿了有一顆水果掉下來.

TRANSL.notes: (The bag) which was full fell down.

S.TRANSL: which was full fell down.

S.FORM: sia moehaeoe maskan.
S.PHON: s~θia mœhæœ mas~θkan.
S.FORM: sia moehaeoe maskan.
S.PHON: s~θia mœhæœ mas~θkan.

TRANSL.notes: 他下來而且(把水果)放下來.

S.TRANSL: 他下來而且 放下來.

TRANSL.notes: He came down and put down (the fruits).

S.TRANSL: He came down and put down .

S.FORM: en rokrokon 'askanen mayhae'hae' roSa'.
S.PHON: ən rokrokon ʔas~θkanən majhæʔhæʔ roʃaʔ.
S.FORM: en rokrokon 'askanen mayhae'hae' roSa'.
S.PHON: ən rokrokon ʔas~θkanən majhæʔhæʔ roʃaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 有兩籃滿了.
Two baskets were full.

S.FORM: kala' 'aehae' 'ima sahae' ri'saza mari'in.
S.PHON: kalaʔ ʔæhæʔ ʔima s~θahæʔ riʔs~θaz~ða mariʔin.
S.FORM: kala' 'aehae' 'ima sahae' ri'saza mari'in.
S.PHON: kalaʔ ʔæhæʔ ʔima s~θahæʔ riʔs~θaz~ða mariʔin.

TRANSL.notes: 一個(水果)掉出籃子來(他就)拿(了).

S.TRANSL: 一個 掉出籃子來 拿 .

TRANSL.notes: One (fruit) fell down from the basket and (he) took (it).

S.TRANSL: One fell down from the basket and took .

S.FORM: tiisin noka kaptimasa'.
S.PHON: tiis~θin noka kaptimas~θaʔ.
S.FORM: tiisin noka kaptimasa'.
S.PHON: tiis~θin noka kaptimas~θaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 用手帕把它擦一擦.
Wiped it with a handkerchief.

S.FORM: oh 'askanen ray kala'.
S.PHON: oh ʔas~θkanən raj kalaʔ.
S.FORM: oh 'askanen ray kala'.
S.PHON: oh ʔas~θkanən raj kalaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 把它放回籃子.

TRANSL.notes: Put (it) back in the basket.

S.TRANSL: Put back in the basket.

S.FORM: o manakis eh kaSna'itol naehaen ray kaehoey rokrok naehaen.
S.PHON: o manakis~θ əh kaʃnaʔitol næhæn raj kæhœj rokrok næhæn.
S.FORM: o manakis eh kaSna'itol naehaen ray kaehoey rokrok naehaen.
S.PHON: o manakis~θ əh kaʃnaʔitol næhæn raj kæhœj rokrok næhæn.
S.TRANSL: 他又爬上去摘更多的水果.

TRANSL.notes: (He) climbed up the tree again to pick (more fruits).

S.TRANSL: climbed up the tree again to pick .

S.FORM: m mwai' 'aehae' ka kamanraan 'ima hoehoeh ka katin.
S.PHON: m mwaiʔ ʔæhæʔ ka kamanraan ʔima hœhœh ka katin.
S.FORM: m mwai' 'aehae' ka kamanraan 'ima hoehoeh ka katin.
S.PHON: m mwaiʔ ʔæhæʔ ka kamanraan ʔima hœhœh ka katin.
S.TRANSL: 有一個男人拉著一頭牛過來.

TRANSL.notes: A man coming; (he) was pulling a cow.

S.TRANSL: A man coming; was pulling a cow.

S.FORM: may 'isaza kita' ka boway rokrok ka katin iya si'ael nisia hoehoehen hoehoeen lososoi.
S.PHON: maj ʔis~θaz~ða kitaʔ ka βowaj rokrok ka katin ija s~θiʔæl nis~θia hœhœhən hœhœən los~θos~θoi.
S.FORM: may 'isaza kita' ka boway rokrok ka katin iya si'ael nisia hoehoehen hoehoeen lososoi.
S.PHON: maj ʔis~θaz~ða kitaʔ ka βowaj rokrok ka katin ija s~θiʔæl nis~θia hœhœhən hœhœən los~θos~θoi.

TRANSL.notes: 看到牛可能想要吃水果, 他把它(從那籃水果子旁)拖走.

S.TRANSL: 看到牛可能想要吃水果, 他把它 拖走.

TRANSL.notes: Seeing the cow might have wanted to eat the fruits that had been picked, he dragged it past (the basket with fruits).

S.TRANSL: Seeing the cow might have wanted to eat the fruits that had been picked, he dragged it past .

S.FORM: rima' ila.
S.PHON: rimaʔ ila.
S.FORM: rima' ila.
S.PHON: rimaʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們走了.

TRANSL.notes: (Off) they went.

S.TRANSL: they went.

S.FORM: o rima' ila hiza kita'en mwai' ila naehaen 'aehae' ka kamo'alay kamo'alay 'ima papama' ray kapapama'an.
S.PHON: o rimaʔ ila hiz~ða kitaʔən mwaiʔ ila næhæn ʔæhæʔ ka kamoʔalaj kamoʔalaj ʔima papamaʔ raj kapapamaʔan.
S.FORM: o rima' ila hiza kita'en mwai' ila naehaen 'aehae' ka kamo'alay kamo'alay 'ima papama' ray kapapama'an.
S.PHON: o rimaʔ ila hiz~ða kitaʔən mwaiʔ ila næhæn ʔæhæʔ ka kamoʔalaj kamoʔalaj ʔima papamaʔ raj kapapamaʔan.
S.TRANSL: 他們走了. 又看到另一個男孩子來了; 他騎著腳踏車.

TRANSL.notes: (Off) they went. (Then I) see another boy coming; he was riding a bike."

S.TRANSL: they went. see another boy coming; he was riding a bike."

S.FORM: roSa' tatakay romnay roSa' 'a kapapama'an.
S.PHON: roʃaʔ tatakaj romnaj roʃaʔ ʔa kapapamaʔan.
S.FORM: roSa' tatakay romnay roSa' 'a kapapama'an.
S.PHON: roʃaʔ tatakaj romnaj roʃaʔ ʔa kapapamaʔan.
S.TRANSL: 兩隻腳踩腳踏車.

TRANSL.notes: (the kind of) vehicle (of which) two legs turn.

S.TRANSL: vehicle two legs turn.

S.FORM: may may isaza kita' hi baki' 'ima rokrok ray kaehoey babaw.
S.PHON: maj maj is~θaz~ða kitaʔ hi βakiʔ ʔima rokrok raj kæhœj βaβaw.
S.FORM: may may isaza kita' hi baki' 'ima rokrok ray kaehoey babaw.
S.PHON: maj maj is~θaz~ða kitaʔ hi βakiʔ ʔima rokrok raj kæhœj βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 經過那裡看到老人在樹上面摘水果.

TRANSL.notes: There (he) saw the old man picking fruits on top of the tree.

S.TRANSL: There saw the old man picking fruits on top of the tree.

S.FORM: saksakosiza kita'.
S.PHON: s~θaks~θakos~θiz~ða kitaʔ.
S.FORM: saksakosiza kita'.
S.PHON: s~θaks~θakos~θiz~ða kitaʔ.

S.FORM: 'okay kita' isaa kita' ka hini boway.
S.PHON: ʔokaj kitaʔ is~θaa kitaʔ ka hini βowaj.
S.FORM: 'okay kita' isaa kita' ka hini boway.
S.PHON: ʔokaj kitaʔ is~θaa kitaʔ ka hini βowaj.

TRANSL.notes: (他)東張西望, 沒有看到(那個老人). (他)看到水果.

S.TRANSL: 東張西望, 沒有看到 . 看到水果.

TRANSL.notes: (He) looked around and did not see (the man). (He) saw the fruits.

S.TRANSL: looked around and did not see . saw the fruits.

S.FORM: sarara' ray kala'.
S.PHON: s~θararaʔ raj kalaʔ.
S.FORM: sarara' ray kala'.
S.PHON: s~θararaʔ raj kalaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (他)喜歡籃子裡的(水果).

S.TRANSL: 喜歡籃子裡的 .

TRANSL.notes: (He) liked (the fruits) in the basket.

S.TRANSL: liked in the basket.

S.FORM: o mariin.
S.PHON: o mariin.
S.FORM: o mariin.
S.PHON: o mariin.

TRANSL.notes: (他就)拿了(一籃).

S.TRANSL: 拿了 .

TRANSL.notes: (He) took (a basket).

S.TRANSL: took .

S.FORM: kaSna' 'ima nia kapapama'an pakalbenen kita' sisilin 'aehae' kala' 'askanen ray kapapama'an nisia karma'en 'araSen ila.
S.PHON: kaʃnaʔ ʔima nia kapapamaʔan pakalβənən kitaʔ s~θis~θilin ʔæhæʔ kalaʔ ʔas~θkanən raj kapapamaʔan nis~θia karmaʔən ʔaraʃən ila.
S.FORM: kaSna' 'ima nia kapapama'an pakalbenen kita' sisilin 'aehae' kala' 'askanen ray kapapama'an nisia karma'en 'araSen ila.
S.PHON: kaʃnaʔ ʔima nia kapapamaʔan pakalβənən kitaʔ s~θis~θilin ʔæhæʔ kalaʔ ʔas~θkanən raj kapapamaʔan nis~θia karmaʔən ʔaraʃən ila.

TRANSL.notes: (他)放下它的腳踏車, (我)看到(他)提起一籃水果放到它的車上. (然後)他騎他(載著)偷走(的水果)的腳踏車走了.

S.TRANSL: 放下它的腳踏車, 看到 提起一籃水果放到它的車上. 他騎他 偷走 的腳踏車走了.

TRANSL.notes: (He) put down his bike and (I) saw (him) lift one basket on (his) bike. (And then) he (rode) his bike and left (with that blasket).

S.TRANSL: put down his bike and saw lift one basket on bike. he his bike and left .

S.FORM: 'am'aemoeh raiw ila o.
S.PHON: ʔamʔæmœh raiw ila o.
S.FORM: 'am'aemoeh raiw ila o.
S.PHON: ʔamʔæmœh raiw ila o.

TRANSL.notes: (男孩)很快的離開.

S.TRANSL: 很快的離開.

TRANSL.notes: (The boy) left quickly.

S.TRANSL: left quickly.

S.FORM: kita'en sasbong ila ka kabinao' noka kapapama'an.
S.PHON: kitaʔən s~θas~θβoŋ ila ka kaβinaoʔ noka kapapamaʔan.
S.FORM: kita'en sasbong ila ka kabinao' noka kapapama'an.
S.PHON: kitaʔən s~θas~θβoŋ ila ka kaβinaoʔ noka kapapamaʔan.

TRANSL.notes: (我)看到他撞到騎腳踏車的女孩.

S.TRANSL: 看到他撞到騎腳踏車的女孩.

TRANSL.notes: (I) saw him run into a girl on a bike.

S.TRANSL: saw him run into a girl on a bike.

S.FORM: kapapama'an lasia sasbong.
S.PHON: kapapamaʔan las~θia s~θas~θβoŋ.
S.FORM: kapapama'an lasia sasbong.
S.PHON: kapapamaʔan las~θia s~θas~θβoŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他們的腳踏車撞在一起.

TRANSL.notes: Their bikes bumped (into something/each other).

S.TRANSL: Their bikes bumped .

S.FORM: o saksakosiza hiza kabinao' sasbong.
S.PHON: o s~θaks~θakos~θiz~ða hiz~ða kaβinaoʔ s~θas~θβoŋ.
S.FORM: o saksakosiza hiza kabinao' sasbong.
S.PHON: o s~θaks~θakos~θiz~ða hiz~ða kaβinaoʔ s~θas~θβoŋ.
S.TRANSL: 男孩東張西望, 就撞到那女孩.
The boy looked around and bumped into the girl.

S.FORM: saksakosiza kita' hoN na tatono' ila ray klobikol ila ray bato' babaw bato' a malben ila ngizo' ila nisia ka boway ray kala' 'am losaah ila saboeh.
S.PHON: s~θaks~θakos~θiz~ða kitaʔ hon na tatonoʔ ila raj kloβikol ila raj βatoʔ βaβaw βatoʔ a malβən ila ŋiz~ðoʔ ila nis~θia ka βowaj raj kalaʔ ʔam los~θaah ila s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: saksakosiza kita' hoN na tatono' ila ray klobikol ila ray bato' babaw bato' a malben ila ngizo' ila nisia ka boway ray kala' 'am losaah ila saboeh.
S.PHON: s~θaks~θakos~θiz~ða kitaʔ hon na tatonoʔ ila raj kloβikol ila raj βatoʔ βaβaw βatoʔ a malβən ila ŋiz~ðoʔ ila nis~θia ka βowaj raj kalaʔ ʔam los~θaah ila s~θaβœh.

TRANSL.notes: (男孩)跌倒 籃子裡所有的水果快要全部撒翻出來.

S.TRANSL: 跌倒 籃子裡所有的水果快要全部撒翻出來.

TRANSL.notes: (The boy) fell down, and all the fruits in his basket were about to spill over the place.

S.TRANSL: fell down, and all the fruits in his basket were about to spill over the place.

S.FORM: 'oka' ila isaa.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila is~θaa.
S.FORM: 'oka' ila isaa.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila is~θaa.

TRANSL.notes: (水果)全部掉了.

S.TRANSL: 全部掉了.

TRANSL.notes: (The fruits) are gone.

S.TRANSL: are gone.

S.FORM: mwai' ila en kita' too' ka korkoring kita' kita' hoN mwai' tatilhaehael rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ila ən kitaʔ tooʔ ka korkoriŋ kitaʔ kitaʔ hon mwaiʔ tatilhæhæl rokrok ka βowaj.
S.FORM: mwai' ila en kita' too' ka korkoring kita' kita' hoN mwai' tatilhaehael rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ila ən kitaʔ tooʔ ka korkoriŋ kitaʔ kitaʔ hon mwaiʔ tatilhæhæl rokrok ka βowaj.

TRANSL.notes: (我)看到三個小孩過來幫忙檢起水果.

S.TRANSL: 看到三個小孩過來幫忙檢起水果.

TRANSL.notes: (I) saw three children coming to help (the boy) pick the fruits up.

S.TRANSL: saw three children coming to help pick the fruits up.

S.FORM: rokrokon ray kala' isa'an 'aehae' mae'iyaeh mwai' poehpoeh ka kaybaeen.
S.PHON: rokrokon raj kalaʔ is~θaʔan ʔæhæʔ mæʔijæh mwaiʔ pœhpœh ka kajβæən.
S.FORM: rokrokon ray kala' isa'an 'aehae' mae'iyaeh mwai' poehpoeh ka kaybaeen.
S.PHON: rokrokon raj kalaʔ is~θaʔan ʔæhæʔ mæʔijæh mwaiʔ pœhpœh ka kajβæən.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們就把水果放進籃子裡 有一個人過來拍掉他衣服上的灰塵.

TRANSL.notes: And then (they were putting the fruits that had been picked) into the basket. A person came to shake the dirt off (his) clothes.

S.TRANSL: And then into the basket. A person came to shake the dirt off clothes.

S.FORM: mwai' ila sia sisilin tatilhaehael sisilin ray kapapama'an.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ila s~θia s~θis~θilin tatilhæhæl s~θis~θilin raj kapapamaʔan.
S.FORM: mwai' ila sia sisilin tatilhaehael sisilin ray kapapama'an.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ila s~θia s~θis~θilin tatilhæhæl s~θis~θilin raj kapapamaʔan.
S.TRANSL: 有一個男孩過來幫忙把籃子提到腳踏車上.

TRANSL.notes: (There) came (a boy who) helped lift (the basket) onto the bike.

S.TRANSL: came helped lift onto the bike.

S.FORM: o sasiwazay ila.
S.PHON: o s~θas~θiwaz~ðaj ila.
S.FORM: o sasiwazay ila.
S.PHON: o s~θas~θiwaz~ðaj ila.

S.FORM: rima' ila lasia too' mae'iyaeh ma' 'ima sasiwazay.
S.PHON: rimaʔ ila las~θia tooʔ mæʔijæh maʔ ʔima s~θas~θiwaz~ðaj.
S.FORM: rima' ila lasia too' mae'iyaeh ma' 'ima sasiwazay.
S.PHON: rimaʔ ila las~θia tooʔ mæʔijæh maʔ ʔima s~θas~θiwaz~ðaj.
S.TRANSL: 那三個人離開, 然後他們就分開了.
The three persons left and they parted ways.

S.FORM: o hiza too' mae'iyaeh kita' hiza ka tatpo'.
S.PHON: o hiz~ða tooʔ mæʔijæh kitaʔ hiz~ða ka tatpoʔ.
S.FORM: o hiza too' mae'iyaeh kita' hiza ka tatpo'.
S.PHON: o hiz~ða tooʔ mæʔijæh kitaʔ hiz~ða ka tatpoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 那三個人看到一個帽子在那裡.
The three persons saw a hat there.

S.FORM: e singowip ila nisia ka tatpo nisia si'oe'oe koSa'en o niSo tatpo' hini.
S.PHON: ə s~θiŋowip ila nis~θia ka tatpo nis~θia s~θiʔœʔœ koʃaʔən o niʃo tatpoʔ hini.
S.FORM: e singowip ila nisia ka tatpo nisia si'oe'oe koSa'en o niSo tatpo' hini.
S.PHON: ə s~θiŋowip ila nis~θia ka tatpo nis~θia s~θiʔœʔœ koʃaʔən o niʃo tatpoʔ hini.
S.TRANSL: 男孩忘了他的帽子. 有一個小孩就叫他, 然後說"這是你的帽子".

TRANSL.notes: (The boy) forgot his hat. (One of the three children) called him and said, "this is your hat.

S.TRANSL: forgot his hat. called him and said, "this is your hat.

S.FORM: mari'in lobih rima' minobih ka mobay ka tatpo'.
S.PHON: mariʔin loβih rimaʔ minoβih ka moβaj ka tatpoʔ.
S.FORM: mari'in lobih rima' minobih ka mobay ka tatpo'.
S.PHON: mariʔin loβih rimaʔ minoβih ka moβaj ka tatpoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩回頭把帽子還給他.
The child returned and went to give him back the hat.

S.FORM: o 'ima koSa ma'alo isaa bowayen papna'aehae' ka boway too' too' mae'iyaeh isaa lasia.
S.PHON: o ʔima koʃa maʔalo is~θaa βowajən papnaʔæhæʔ ka βowaj tooʔ tooʔ mæʔijæh is~θaa las~θia.
S.FORM: o 'ima koSa ma'alo isaa bowayen papna'aehae' ka boway too' too' mae'iyaeh isaa lasia.
S.PHON: o ʔima koʃa maʔalo is~θaa βowajən papnaʔæhæʔ ka βowaj tooʔ tooʔ mæʔijæh is~θaa las~θia.
S.TRANSL: 他謝謝那些小孩.然後給他們三人每人一個水果, 然後就離開.

TRANSL.notes: (He) thanked (the children) and gave each of the three a fruit; then they left.

S.TRANSL: thanked and gave each of the three a fruit; then they left.

S.FORM: kamamanraan rima' ila.
S.PHON: kamamanraan rimaʔ ila.
S.FORM: kamamanraan rima' ila.
S.PHON: kamamanraan rimaʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 男孩離開了.
The boy left.

S.FORM: e rima' ila mya too' mae'iyaeh ma rima' ila.
S.PHON: ə rimaʔ ila mja tooʔ mæʔijæh ma rimaʔ ila.
S.FORM: e rima' ila mya too' mae'iyaeh ma rima' ila.
S.PHON: ə rimaʔ ila mja tooʔ mæʔijæh ma rimaʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 三個人也走了.
The three persons also went away.

S.FORM: hiza baki' 'ima rokrok ka boway kasrai' ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða βakiʔ ʔima rokrok ka βowaj kas~θraiʔ ila.
S.FORM: hiza baki' 'ima rokrok ka boway kasrai' ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða βakiʔ ʔima rokrok ka βowaj kas~θraiʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 那個摘水果的老人從樹上爬下來.

TRANSL.notes: The old man picking fruits there climbed down (the tree).

S.TRANSL: The old man picking fruits there climbed down .

S.FORM: koSa hayno' ila ma'an kala' hini' 'ima too' o 'am 'aehae' 'ima mayhae'hae' ray kala' hayno' ila.
S.PHON: koʃa hajnoʔ ila maʔan kalaʔ hiniʔ ʔima tooʔ o ʔam ʔæhæʔ ʔima majhæʔhæʔ raj kalaʔ hajnoʔ ila.
S.FORM: koSa hayno' ila ma'an kala' hini' 'ima too' o 'am 'aehae' 'ima mayhae'hae' ray kala' hayno' ila.
S.PHON: koʃa hajnoʔ ila maʔan kalaʔ hiniʔ ʔima tooʔ o ʔam ʔæhæʔ ʔima majhæʔhæʔ raj kalaʔ hajnoʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 有一個裝滿水果的籃子哪裡去了?
Where are my baskets here? There were three. One basket was filled with fruits. Where is it?

S.FORM: 'az'azem kita' hayza' too' mae'iyaeh may isaza korkoring.
S.PHON: ʔaz~ðʔaz~ðəm kitaʔ hajz~ðaʔ tooʔ mæʔijæh maj is~θaz~ða korkoriŋ.
S.FORM: 'az'azem kita' hayza' too' mae'iyaeh may isaza korkoring.
S.PHON: ʔaz~ðʔaz~ðəm kitaʔ hajz~ðaʔ tooʔ mæʔijæh maj is~θaz~ða korkoriŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他看到三個小孩經過那裡心想.

TRANSL.notes: (He) thought he saw there were three boys passing by there.

S.TRANSL: thought he saw there were three boys passing by there.

S.FORM: ray hima' papna'aehae' ka boway.
S.PHON: raj himaʔ papnaʔæhæʔ ka βowaj.
S.FORM: ray hima' papna'aehae' ka boway.
S.PHON: raj himaʔ papnaʔæhæʔ ka βowaj.
S.TRANSL: 每個人手上都有一個水果.
Each with a fruit on his hand.

S.FORM: eh 'oka' ila.
S.PHON: əh ʔokaʔ ila.
S.FORM: eh 'oka' ila.
S.PHON: əh ʔokaʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 沒有了 哈哈哈.
That's all. Hahaha.
